evals.prompt: I have a 1.2 kb gene in a FASTA file and want a quick go/no-go on whether it expresses. How do I order a cell-free protein expression validation on Ginkgo Cloud Lab and what will it cost?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ginkgo-cloud. Routes to the Cell Free Protein Expression Validation protocol on cloud.ginkgo.bio: submit the FASTA (up to 1800 bp), expect expression confirmation, baseline titer (mg/L), and virtual gel images at $39/sample with a 5-10 day turnaround, walking through the ordering workflow.

evals.prompt: My membrane protein won't express well. Can Ginkgo Cloud Lab screen multiple conditions to optimize expression?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ginkgo-cloud. Routes to Cell Free Protein Expression Optimization: DoE-based screening across up to 24 conditions per protein (lysates, temperatures, chaperones, disulfide enhancers, cofactors), designed for difficult-to-express and membrane proteins, at $199/sample, 6-11 day turnaround.

assertions.value: Recommends the optimization protocol with its DoE multi-condition screening for membrane/difficult proteins.

evals.prompt: I want to turn a 64x64 pixel-art PNG of our lab logo into living fluorescent bacterial art. Is that something Ginkgo Cloud Lab can do?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ginkgo-cloud. Routes to Fluorescent Pixel Art Generation: accepts a 48x48 to 96x96 px PNG/SVG, prints with up to 11 E. coli strains via acoustic dispensing, delivered as high-res UV photographs at $25/plate (Beta), and walks through uploading the image and ordering.

evals.prompt: My workflow isn't one of the listed Ginkgo protocols. How do I get a feasibility assessment and price for a custom protocol on the cloud lab?
evals.expected_output: Invokes alterlab-ginkgo-cloud. Directs the user to the EstiMate AI agent, which accepts a plain-language protocol description and returns a compatibility/feasibility assessment and pricing for custom workflows beyond the listed protocols.

evals.prompt: Write me an Opentrons Flex protocol that does a serial dilution across a 96-well plate on our own robot in the lab.
evals.expected_output: Does NOT invoke this skill; defers to alterlab-opentrons. The user is programming their own Opentrons hardware with the Protocol API, not submitting a protocol to Ginkgo's remote autonomous cloud lab (RACs).
